programmes.show_description: Kick back and relax with some mellow moments. Chilled to perfection.
The A1 boys take you back to glory days of Take That, New Kids, 5ive, Spice Girls, Boyzone, Eternal & more where '90s stars dominated all the best magazine polls!
Every track a smash hit in the 90s or 00s, every video a UK chart number one. What more could you possibly need in life?
Kick back and relax with some mellow moments. Chilled to perfection.
Have you ever wondered what the 30 biggest selling love songs of the 90s were? Wonder no more. It's time to get it on!
Every track a smash hit, every video a UK chart number one in the 00s. What more could you possibly need in life!

programmes.show_name: Jenny Powell: Such A Good Feeling!
programmes.show_description: Dancing through history - one anthem at a time! From late 80s optimism to mid 90s euphoria, it's where house, rave & eurodance all started. Hands in the air people!
Dust off your flip phones and get ready to dance the day away with the ultimate collection of hits that'll transport you back to those unforgettable millenium parties!
Amazing songs, nonsense titles. So, Get UR Freak On while you are Chasing Pavements on your JCB!
There's nothing quite like a cheesy good party... Unless its a 90s cheesy party that is!! These are the greatest party anthems from the 90s. Fact!
Loud shirts, foam mallet & 25 huge videos of the decade are ready to go as Timmy Mallett brings us his Utterly Brilliant party!
From little monsters to global chart domination! Starting back in 2009, we celebrate the iconic music & artistry from the awesome 'Haus of Gaga'!
4 hours of slammin' pop & rock hits crossing 2 decades - 1 belter from the 90s followed by another from the 00s. Simple!
Kick back and relax with some mellow moments. Chilled to perfection.
Songs you may have forgotten from artists you'll certainly know!
Loads of your favourite hits during the 00s were just cover versions of old songs for acts like Madonna, Girls Aloud & Adele, but can you recall who did the originals? Let's see!
10 hits from the 90s, including charity hits, movie songs, 2 number 1s & duets with George Michael, Kiki Dee, Luciano Pavarotti, LeAnn Rimes & RuPaul!
Time to draw the curtains, hold up the lighter and sing your heart out with the 40 greatest power ballads of the 90s!
The 00s was a hotbed of top talent, but who were the biggest pin-ups? Reminisce with the best - Robbie, Kylie, Rihanna, Justin & there's even room for Duncan and the boys from Blue.
Popcorn at the ready, these are the biggest songs from the movies. But don't forget to switch off your mobile phone!
Can you believe that 1994 delivered so many huge movie hits? Top songs from The Lion King, The Three Musketeers, Four Weddings, Reality Bites & more!
Popcorn at the ready, these are NOW's biggest songs from the movies. But don't forget to switch off your mobile phone!
The 80s & 90s were the golden decades for movie songs - but there were still a few in the 00s - some well remembered, and some not! Pat Sharp has found 25 - grab that popcorn.
Popcorn at the ready, these are NOW's biggest songs from the movies. But don't forget to switch off your mobile phone!
Get the tissues ready for 20 box office ballads! Starting in the 90's with a classic from the blockbuster Ghost through to Take That's epic Stardust anthem in the 00s!
Popcorn at the ready, these are NOW's biggest songs from the movies. But don't forget to switch off your mobile phone!
Bruno Brookes with the soundtrack of a decade - literally - the biggest UK movie songs of the 90s. Expect 007, Austin Powers, Romeo & Juliet, Robin Hood and those Men In Black!
